_meta.name: Ratopati Event Day Archive
_meta.notes: Only days containing one or more embedded events are archived. Each day keeps the original event list returned by Ratopati's decoded month payload.

events.title_np: जातीय भेदभाव तथा छुवाछूत उन्मूलन दिवस
